items.title: Zelensky’s Dizzying U-Turn Is the Latest Zigzag in a Presidency Full of Them
items.summary: President Volodymyr Zelensky of Ukraine has pivoted from unpopular moves before, but a recent decision about military leadership and strategy could weaken his position.
